Keynote Speaker, Dave Delaney

Hi, I'm Dave Delaney.

I've combined everything I know about conferences to improve your sponsors' outcomes so they return each year.

Your sponsors and exhibitors will learn what to do before, during, and after your event, making it a huge success.

Recommend us to your sponsors for a complimentary strategy session and remind them to let us know you sent them. 10X Conference Coaching sessions are designed to help your sponsors maximize their return on investment, leaving them happier than ever with your event and planning to return each year.

Why Dave Delaney?

A Trusted Speaker for Google.

Dave delivered hundreds of trainings to thousands of people across the US and Canada, representing Google for over five years.

“He knows his stuff... If you have an opportunity to work together, it will be worth it.”
— Anastasia Kudrez, Google

An Acclaimed Keynote Speaker.

Read testimonials from LinkedIn, UPS, FedEx, Google, MPI, and SHRM about how Dave empowers, enlightens, and entertains audiences with his keynote presentations on communication, leadership, and networking.

“Dave exceeded our expectations… Being a business owner, he was able to empathize with the audience and offer them real tips and advice they can use... authentic, informative and very well received”
— Nicole (Belt) Cox, The UPS Store

A Seasoned Workshop Facilitator.

Learn about Dave's work teaching teams how to connect with one another while using strategies to improve their communication, public speaking, and leadership skills.

“Dave is the Real Deal! His approach and knowledge made the time and investment pay off immediately. Yes, we give Dave as many ‘Thumbs Up’ as we possibly can.”
— Ginger Hardage, Former SVP of Culture & Communications at Southwest Airlines

A Published Author and Networking Expert.

Learn about Dave's acclaimed book, New Business Networking, which helps readers discover how to use online and offline techniques and strategies to improve the outcome of their professional networking efforts.

“⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 4.8 out of 5!”
— Amazon Customer Reviews

Simply direct your sponsors and exhibitors to book their free 10X Conference Coaching session.

Be sure to remind them to include your name in the “How did you hear about 10X Conference Coaching?” field. We will follow up and let you know who signs up.

About 10X Conference Coaching

You have enough to manage. Let us help your sponsors see success.

Copy the text below into your email marketing platform to send to your sponsors, or click here to compose an email now if you prefer.

As a bonus for becoming a sponsor, we're offering you a complimentary 10X Conference Coaching session with Dave Delaney, a former Google speaker, published author, and keynote speaker.

Visit https://futureforth.com/10x now to claim your session before they fill up and discover precisely what to do before, during, and after the conference to increase your sponsorship ROI.
“Communication isn’t a soft skill. It’s a superpower.”

— Dave Delaney, powered by Futureforth.

  • Coaching
  • Presentations
  • Workshops
  • Contact

Dave Delaney is an internationally recognized keynote speaker, leadership consultant, and communication strategist. As the founder of Futureforth, he works with organizations to improve employee retention, build inclusive workplace cultures, and enhance communication across hybrid, remote, and in-person teams. He speaks on topics such as neurodiversity in leadership, modern communication strategies, and connection-driven team building.

Futureforth
2517 Lebanon Road
Nashville, TN, USA
615-823-1608
